details.note: 5 critical security gaps found: no main-process uncaughtException handler, no CSP, disabled update signatures on Windows, no runtime IPC validation, no Linux auto-update. 2 tests only.
Plugin system is mature (20+ lifecycle hooks, tool/TUI/provider extension). Critical gaps: no sandboxing, no permission model, no desktop Electron plugin surface, no formal API versioning.

details.pattern: Architecture audit - god package with no API boundary
details.note: Wildcard export pattern on @opencode-ai/core. 476+ imports from opencode. Only 2 desktop tests, 6 UI tests. Plugin SDK has zero tests.

details.pattern: Debuggability audit - strong foundation with gaps
details.note: 84 typed error classes, Sentry+OTLP, structured logging. Gaps: no metrics, no in-app debug panel, no main-process error handler, no sidecar crash log collection.

details.pattern: UX audit - rich TUI, thin desktop
details.note: Mature TUI with command palette/dialogs/themes. Desktop is thin webview shell. Storybook with 115+ stories but a11y tests disabled. v1→v2 migration incomplete.

details.pattern: IPC design — 40+ renderer→main channels, 6 main→renderer push channels. SSE stream already consumed by renderer via ServerSDKProvider. No new IPC channel needed for viz.
details.note: Viz overlay reuses existing SSE stream — no IPC changes needed for data pipeline.

details.pattern: UI patterns — SessionSidePanel tabbed panel, ResizeHandle, Popover, StatusPopover. CSS-only animations (no motion library). SVG rendering native. No graph viz deps (D3 not in main app).
details.note: Panel extension + CSS animations + SVG graph = most native approach.
TaskStatusChanged, PathClaimed, SessionHeartbeat, ActivityLogged — coordinate events for session viz

details.pattern: Added Viz tab to SessionSidePanel tabs
details.note: New Viz tab renders VizPanel with CodebaseMap + ActivityFeed
VizPanel, ActivityFeed, CodebaseMap, SessionBadge, barrel index
Added showSessionViz toggle to Settings.general interface, default, and provider
Added keyboard shortcut handler: Cmd+Shift+V toggles viz panel
Wired SessionHeartbeat Bus publish after heartbeat JSONL write
